title: Emergent Intelligence
text:
Welcome to my central research hub. Select a domain matrix below to explore my chronological project logs, active simulations, and codebases.








Ant Colony Optimization


Simulating swarm intelligence, complex pheromone mapping, and emergent collective behaviors.
















Cellular Automata


Exploring Conway’s Game of Life, elementary rulesets, and localized emergent structures.
















Immune System Simulations


Modeling artificial immune responses, pathogen defenses, and agent-based biological systems.
















Spiking Neural Networks


Investigating time-dependent neural dynamics, STDP learning rules, and neuromorphic frameworks.

title: Welcome To My Blog
text:
This is the first post in a Quarto blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.

title: My First Python Code Post
text:
Watch how Quarto can actually run Python code and show the result!

def calculate_squares(numbers):
    return [n**2 for n in numbers]

my_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print("Original:", my_list)
print("Squares:", calculate_squares(my_list))

Original: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
Squares: [1, 4, 9, 16, 25]

title: My First Python Code Post
text:
Watch how Quarto can actually run Python code and show the result!

def calculate_squares(numbers):
    return [n**2 for n in numbers]

my_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print("Original:", my_list)
print("Squares:", calculate_squares(my_list))

Original: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
Squares: [1, 4, 9, 16, 25]
